summary: Completed frontend testing of Operations Dashboard work queue tiles feature. All 4 tiles present with correct data-testid attributes, proper highlight/muted states based on pending work, tile click navigation working correctly, and 30-second auto-refresh polling implemented.

frontend: ops-work-tiles container (data-testid='ops-work-tiles') present at top of /ops page
ops-tile-tvt: 'Transition Verification' tile found with correct data-testid
ops-tile-dts: 'Trustee Services' tile found with correct data-testid
ops-tile-support: 'Customer Support' tile found with correct data-testid
ops-tile-verify: 'Tier Verifications' tile found with correct data-testid
Customer Support tile highlighted with pulsing badge showing '9 Messages awaiting reply' (matches backend unanswered_support=9)
Other tiles (TVT, DTS, Verify) show 'All clear' in muted state (no pending work)
Clicking Customer Support tile navigates to /ops/support tab
Founder Dashboard (/admin) does NOT show ops-work-tiles (operatorMode check working)
Founder Dashboard shows 'Needs Your Attention' section with pending items
30-second auto-refresh polling implemented in useEffect for operatorMode
Highlighted tiles have colored border, background, box-shadow, and animate-pulse badge
Muted tiles have neutral styling and 'All clear' text
backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns stats for admin role (verified)
GET /api/admin/stats returns stats for operator role (verified)
Stats include: pending_certificates, reviewing_certificates, pending_dts, unanswered_support, pending_verifications

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users from iteration 65
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work queue tiles feature fully implemented and tested. All 4 tiles (TVT, DTS, Support, Verify) working with correct data-testids, highlight states, navigation, and 30s polling. Rate limiting on login endpoint - wait 30+ seconds between attempts.
